mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, token, expire_time, create_time FROM user_token WHERE token = #{token} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, token, expire_time, create_time FROM user_token WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_token(user_id, token, expire_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{token}, #{expireTime})
